message:
fix(ui): improve tooltip touch detection and mobile handling

Enhance tooltip-shell.tsx with better touch device detection to
prevent unwanted hover behaviors on mobile and tablet devices.

Key improvements:
- Add touchEnvironment check using (hover: none) and (pointer: coarse)
  media queries in all interaction handlers
- Check touch environment at interaction time, not just on mount,
  to handle hybrid devices that may switch input modes
- Guard handleMouseEnter, handleMouseLeave, handleFocus, handleBlur,
  and handleClick with touch environment detection
- Ensure tooltips only open via click/tap on touch devices
- Prevent phantom hover states on touch screens

This fixes issues where tooltips would erroneously appear or stay
open on tablets and touch-enabled laptops when users were using
touch input rather than mouse/trackpad.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
